title: Income Tax (Konoike Construction Company Limited) (Approval and Exemption) Order, 2025

sections.text:
Construction Company Limited) (Approval and Exemption) Order, commence-

sections.text:
(2) This Order is deemed to have come into operation on 8th
December, 2022, and shall stand revoked on 31st December, 2027.

sections.text:
organisation for the purpose of exemption from income tax with and

respect to the Agreement specified in the Schedule for the duration

sections.heading: The income earned including interest, fees and commission Exemption
sections.text:
by Konoike Construction Company Limited pursuant to the from tax
agreement specified in the Schedule is exempt from income tax in
accordance with paragraph 4(b) of part II of the Second Schedule
to the Act.
Copies of this Statutory Instrument can be obtained from the Government Printer,
